name: Aarakora
description: Bird-like humanoids native to the Elemental Plane of Air, Aarakocra value freedom and privacy, often making their homes in high mountains.

name: Aboleth
description: An aboleth is an aquatic, fish-like aberration with three eyes, a mucous-covered body, and four tentacles. They are ancient, intelligent, and possess powerful psionic abilities, seeking to enslave all other sentient beings.

name: Abominable Yeti
description: An abominable yeti is a larger, more powerful variant of the yeti, an apex predator of icy mountains. It is a terrifying sight, known for its chilling gaze and deadly claws, relentlessly hunting prey in its frozen domain.

name: Acererak
description: Acererak is a legendary archlich, a master of necromancy and traps, and a demilich obsessed with collecting powerful souls and artifacts. He is one of the most feared villains in Dungeons & Dragons, responsible for the Tomb of Horrors and the Tomb of Annihilation.
languages: Abyssal, Celestial, Common, Draconic, Dwarvish, Elvish, Giant, Infernal, Primordial, Undercommon, telepathy 120 ft.

name: Acolyte
description: An acolyte is a junior priest, devoted to a deity and often serving in a temple or shrine. They provide spiritual guidance, tend to the faithful, and can cast basic divine spells.

name: Adult Black Dragon
description: Adult black dragons are vile and cruel winged predators, dwelling in swamps and dark fens. They possess acidic breath and a terrifying presence, delighting in the suffering and despair of other creatures.

name: Adult Blue Dracolich
description: An adult blue dracolich is an undead blue dragon, risen by necromantic magic to serve a powerful spellcaster, usually a lich. It retains its terrifying lightning breath and formidable physical might, now combined with the immortality and malevolence of undeath.

name: Adult Blue Dragon
description: Adult blue dragons are territorial and vain predators of deserts and dry lands, known for their powerful lightning breath. They hoard treasure and dominate the skies, their scales shimmering like the desert sky.

name: Adult Brass Dragon
description: Adult brass dragons are garrulous and inquisitive desert dwellers, preferring to parley rather than fight, especially if it means sharing stories. They are known for their fiery breath and fascination with tales.

name: Adult Bronze Dragon
description: Adult bronze dragons are noble and courageous protectors of shorelines and coastal areas, often aiding good creatures against evil. They are known for their lightning breath and ability to communicate with aquatic creatures.

name: Adult Copper Dragon
description: Mischievous and avaricious, adult copper dragons are fond of jokes, riddles, and pranks, making their lairs in dry canyons and mountains.

name: Adult Gold Dragon
description: Adult gold dragons are the most powerful and majestic of the metallic dragons, staunch champions of justice and protectors of the innocent. They often take on humanoid forms to walk among mortals, offering guidance and battling evil in disguise.

name: Adult Green Dragon
description: A cunning and treacherous predator, an adult green dragon delights in corrupting and controlling sentient beings, slowly eroding their will to serve its evil whims. It dwells in ancient forests and marshes, poisoning the land with its presence.

name: Adult Red Dragon
description: The most covetous of all true dragons, an adult red dragon is a terrifying force of destruction, obsessed with amassing treasure and asserting its dominance through fear and fire. It makes its lair in scorching mountains and volcanoes.

name: Adult Silver Dragon
description: A benevolent and majestic creature, an adult silver dragon cherishes humanoids and often takes on a humanoid guise to observe and aid them, preferring to use its wisdom and strength to protect the innocent. It dwells in cold mountains and cloud-shrouded peaks.

name: Adult White Dragon
description: Brutish and territorial, an adult white dragon is the least intelligent of the true dragons, driven by primeval urges for food and dominion over frozen wastes. It lives in icy caves and glacial crevasses, hoarding treasures from its kills.
speed: 40 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 80 ft., swim 40 ft.

name: Air Elemental
description: A swirling vortex of air, an air elemental is a living force of nature that can manifest as a powerful gust or a suffocating whirlwind, sweeping through battlefields and carrying away foes. It is often summoned from the Elemental Plane of Air.

name: Allosaurus
description: A ferocious bipedal predator, the allosaurus is a territorial hunter that preys on large herbivores, using its powerful jaws and razor claws to tear apart its victims. It is a common sight in primeval jungles and lost worlds.

name: Ancient Black Dragon
description: A malevolent and ancient terror, an ancient black dragon is a master of ambush and deception, dwelling in vast swamps and festering fens, where it plots the ruin of nearby settlements. Its corrosive breath can melt steel and flesh alike.

name: Ancient Blue Dragon
description: An ancient blue dragon is a vain and territorial predator that dominates deserts and arid lands, using its lightning breath to devastate any who dare intrude upon its domain. It often buries its hoards deep beneath the sands.

name: Ancient Brass Dragon
description: A surprisingly jovial and conversational creature, an ancient brass dragon makes its home in vast deserts, eager to share stories and knowledge with travelers, but quick to defend its hoarded treasures. It can exhale a fiery breath or a sleep-inducing gas.

name: Ancient Bronze Dragon
description: A noble and vigilant protector, an ancient bronze dragon often makes its lair near coastlines and large bodies of water, defending them from evil and often aiding ships in distress. It can breathe lightning or a repelling gas.

name: Ancient Copper Dragon
description: Ancient copper dragons are jovial and art-loving, preferring to live in dry, rocky regions and mountain plateaus where they can collect treasure and tell stories to their hoard. They are infamous for their trickery, riddles, and pranks, especially on those who dare to enter their lairs.

name: Ancient Gold Dragon
description: Ancient gold dragons are wise and regal, viewing themselves as protectors of justice and the natural order. They often take on humanoid guises to observe lesser creatures and intervene when great evils threaten the world.

name: Ancient Green Dragon
description: Ancient green dragons are cunning and cruel masters of manipulation, preferring to dwell in ancient forests and marshes where they weave intricate webs of deceit to dominate lesser creatures. They savor corrupting mortals and collecting sentient creatures as prized additions to their hoards.

name: Ancient Red Dragon
description: Ancient red dragons are avaricious and terrifying tyrants, obsessed with increasing their vast hoards and dominating all who live nearby. They lair in hot, dry places like volcanoes or deserts, where they can watch over their treasures and unleash their fiery wrath.

name: Ancient Silver Dragon
description: Ancient silver dragons are benevolent and honorable, often taking humanoid forms to interact with mortals and learn about their cultures. They typically dwell atop frosty mountains and glaciers, protecting good-aligned creatures and combating evil.

name: Ancient White Dragon
description: Ancient white dragons are brutal and territorial predators, driven by primeval urges to hunt, kill, and hoard. They lair in frozen wastes and glacial caves, where their breath weapon can devastate intruders and freeze vast areas.
speed: 40 ft., burrow 40 ft., fly 80 ft., swim 40 ft.

name: Androsphinx
description: Androsphinxes are majestic and powerful guardians, often found protecting sacred sites or ancient secrets. They are known for their riddles, their roar, and their ability to command elemental magic.

name: Animated Armor
description: Animated armors are magical constructs brought to life by powerful enchantments, serving as silent guardians or menacing traps. They clank and creak with uncanny movement, often indistinguishable from unoccupied suits of armor until they attack.

name: Ankheg
description: Ankhegs are predatory insectoid monstrosities that burrow beneath the ground, ambushing unsuspecting prey from below. They digest their victims with corrosive acid, which they can also spray as a defensive measure.

name: Ankylosaurus
description: Ankylosauruses are large, herbivorous dinosaurs known for their armored bodies and powerful club-like tails. They are generally placid but will fiercely defend themselves when threatened.

name: Arcanaloth
description: Arcanaloths are the masterminds and schemers among the yugoloths, often serving as scribes, lorekeepers, and agents of chaos. They are cunning fiends who trade in souls and secrets, always seeking to gain power and influence.

name: Archmage
description: An archmage is a powerful spellcaster, a master of arcane lore and magic, capable of wielding devastating spells. They are typically found in positions of great authority or secluded in their towers pursuing forgotten knowledge.

name: Assassin
description: Assassins are deadly killers who specialize in stealth, poison, and swift, lethal strikes against unsuspecting targets. They operate from the shadows, often employed by powerful individuals or organizations to eliminate enemies.

name: Azer
description: Azers are industrious humanoids native to the Elemental Plane of Fire, made of bronze and fire. They are known for their craftsmanship, especially metalwork, and are often enslaved by more powerful elemental beings or efreet.

name: Balor
description: Balors are the most terrifying and powerful of the demons, towering fiends embodying the chaotic evil of the Abyss. They wield immense destructive power, often leading demonic legions into battle.

name: Bandit
description: Bandits are common thugs and criminals who prey on travelers and merchants, often forming small gangs for greater strength. They are generally unorganized, motivated by greed and opportunism.

name: Bandit Captain
description: A bandit captain is a seasoned leader among criminals, commanding a gang of brigands with a mix of intimidation and charisma. They are more skilled in combat and tactics than their subordinates, often having a bounty on their head.

name: Banshee
description: A banshee is the tortured spirit of an evil female elf, cursed to mourn her beauty and lost life. She manifests as a spectral figure, her wails capable of striking terror and death into the hearts of living creatures.

name: Barbed Devil
description: Barbed devils are common infernal soldiers, known for their spiky hides and cruel dispositions, often serving as enforcers or guards. They delight in tormenting mortals and spreading fear wherever they go.

name: Beholder
description: Beholders are terrifying, xenophobic aberrations that float through the air, their central eye and multiple eyestalks firing deadly magical rays. They are highly intelligent, paranoid, and believe themselves to be the pinnacle of creation.

name: Beholder Zombie
description: A grotesque, undead orb of eyes, animated by dark magic to serve as a tireless guardian, its flesh rotting and its gaze still deadly. It lacks the terrifying intelligence of a living beholder, reduced to a shambling monstrosity.

name: Bhir
description: A solitary, six-legged predator with a chitinous carapace and glowing eyes, the Bhir hunts by ambushing prey in dense jungles, using its powerful jaws and razor claws to quickly overwhelm its victims.

name: Black Dragon Wyrmling
description: A newly hatched, ravenous black dragon, characterized by its acidic breath and cruel intelligence, dwelling in swamps and marshes where it lurks to ambush unsuspecting prey.

name: Black Pudding
description: A corrosive, amorphous ooze that dissolves organic and inorganic matter alike, leaving behind only polished stone or bare earth. It is a mindless hunter, consuming everything in its path.

name: Blue Dragon Wyrmling
description: A proud and vain young blue dragon, already demonstrating its control over lightning and its preference for desert environments, where it hoards treasures in deep caverns.

name: Blue Slaad
description: A brute among slaadi, known for its destructive tendencies and explosive spores, native to the ever-shifting chaos of Limbo. It delights in physical combat and spreading its chaotic influence.

name: Bone Devil
description: A skeletal fiend from the Nine Hells, serving as a cruel enforcer and torturer, often found guarding important locations or hunting down souls for its infernal masters.

name: Bone Naga
description: The skeletal remains of a powerful naga, animated by dark magic and driven by malice. It retains some of its former magical prowess and cunning, despite its undead nature.

name: Brass Dragon Wyrmling
description: A curious and talkative young brass dragon, dwelling in sandy deserts where it loves to burrow and converse with travelers, often sharing ancient tales in exchange for news or treasures.

name: Bronze Dragon Wyrmling
description: Young metallic dragons are often curious and good-natured, and bronze dragons are particularly social, enjoying the company of humanoids. They dwell on coastlines and islands, hunting aquatic creatures and defending the innocent.

name: Bugbear
description: Bugbears are hairy, goblinoid creatures that lurk in the shadows, preferring to ambush their prey and use their stealth to gain advantage. They serve goblins and hobgoblins as enforcers and shock troops, though their loyalty is tenuous.

name: Bugbear Chief
description: A bugbear chief is a hulking, imposing goblinoid leader, stronger and more cunning than its kin, commanding its subordinates with a brutal grip. They are often found leading raiding parties or guarding important locations for their hobgoblin masters.

name: Bulette
description: These monstrous land sharks are voracious predators of the plains and hills, constantly hunting and devouring anything they encounter. Known for their powerful leaps and destructive burrowing, bulettes are a terror to livestock and travelers alike.

name: Bullywug
description: Bullywugs are frog-like humanoids that dwell in swamps and marshes, aspiring to be rulers of their slimy domains. They are boastful and cruel, seeing themselves as rightful masters of all creatures lesser than them, which is almost everything.

name: Cambion
description: Cambions are the offspring of a fiend and a humanoid, inheriting a mix of both lineages. They are cruel and arrogant, possessing innate magical abilities and a thirst for power, often seeking to dominate and corrupt others.

name: Camel
description: Camels are sturdy beasts of burden, well-adapted to arid environments, often used by travelers and merchants in deserts. They are known for their ability to carry heavy loads and survive long periods without water.

name: Carrion Crawler
description: Carrion crawlers are disgusting, many-legged creatures that scavenge in dungeons and sewers, preying on dead and paralyzed victims. Their paralyzing tentacles make them dangerous foes despite their preference for carrion.

name: Cat
description: Cats are small, agile felines often kept as pets, known for their stealth and keen senses. Despite their domesticity, they retain a predatory nature, hunting small vermin with cunning and grace.

name: Cave Bear
description: Cave bears are massive, aggressive omnivores that inhabit temperate forests and mountains, often found dwelling in caves. They are larger and more territorial than common bears, fiercely defending their territory and cubs.

name: Centaur
description: Wild and reclusive, centaurs are fey creatures that roam sylvan forests, acting as guardians against intrusion.

name: Chain Devil
description: Chain devils, or kytons, are sadomasochistic fiends from Avernus that delight in tormenting their victims with enchanted chains. They can animate chains to attack independently.

name: Chasme
description: Chasmes are demon insectoids from the Abyss that spread despair and sow discord with their droning buzz, preying on those weakened by its influence.

name: Chimera
description: A terrifying hybrid beast, a chimera combines the heads of a lion, a goat, and a dragon, each with its own deadly attack. These monstrosities are often found guarding ancient ruins or treasures.

name: Chuul
description: These amphibious, lobster-like monstrosities with tentacles for a mouth guard ancient ruins and treasures, often in service to aberrations. They use their pincers to grapple and their tentacles to extract brains.
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak

name: Clay Golem
description: A hulking construct animated by a powerful elemental spirit, a clay golem is a mindless guardian that regenerates damage and flies into a berserk rage when injured.
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

name: Cloaker
description: These manta-ray-like aberrations lurk in dark places, mimicking cave walls before revealing their true, terrifying forms to ambush prey with their bites and unsettling moans.

name: Cloud Giant
description: Majestic and aloof, cloud giants dwell among the clouds in vast castles, often engaging in games of chance and valuing beauty and fine craftsmanship.

name: Cockatrice
description: This reptilian bird has the power to turn creatures to stone with a touch, making it a dangerous pest despite its small size.

name: Commoner
description: Commoners are non-adventuring individuals found in settlements and rural areas, representing the everyday people of the world. They are typically unarmored and unarmed or carry simple tools.

name: Constrictor Snake
description: A large serpent that coils around its prey, crushing them before swallowing them whole.

name: Copper Dragon Wyrmling
description: A mischievous and playful young dragon, known for its love of riddles, pranks, and a hoard filled with unusual treasures.

name: Courtier
description: A well-spoken and influential individual, accustomed to the intricacies of court life and social maneuvering.

name: Coutal
description: A wise and benevolent feathered serpent, a divine messenger and guardian of ancient secrets and good.

name: Crab
description: A small, hard-shelled crustacean with pincers, often found scuttling along shorelines or underwater.

name: Crawling Claw
description: A severed hand animated by dark magic, often used as a minion or spy by necromancers.
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

name: Crocodile
description: A large, amphibious reptile with powerful jaws, known for lurking in murky waters and ambushing its prey.

name: Cult Fanatic
description: A zealous follower of a dark power, capable of wielding minor divine magic and inspiring fellow cultists.

name: Cultist
description: A devoted but often expendable follower of a malevolent entity or ideology, serving as a foot soldier for darker forces.

name: Cyclops
description: A hulking one-eyed giant, Cyclopes are solitary and brutish, often living in remote hills and islands, content with simple pleasures and prone to fits of rage.

name: Dao
description: A greedy and territorial elemental from the Elemental Plane of Earth, a dao is a tyrannical genie that delights in enslaving mortals and hoarding treasure.

name: Darkmantle
description: A predatory monstrosity that resembles a leathery cloak, a darkmantle lurks in dark places, dropping onto unsuspecting prey to smother them and drain their life force.

name: Death Knight
description: A powerful undead champion, a death knight is a fallen paladin who violated their sacred oath and was raised as a spectral warrior, often riding a nightmare and wielding dark magic.

name: Death Slaad
description: The most powerful and cunning of the slaadi, a death slaad is a horrifying frog-like fiend capable of shapechanging and wielding potent magic.

name: Death Tyrant
description: The undead form of a beholder, a death tyrant floats menacingly, its central eye emitting a powerful ray that negates magic and its eyestalks firing deathly beams.

name: Deathdog
description: A grotesque two-headed canine, a deathdog is a ravenous undead beast whose bite carries a necrotic disease.

name: Deep Gnome (Svirfneblin)
description: A reclusive and cautious humanoid, deep gnomes live in hidden settlements deep underground, renowned for their stealth and gem-cutting skills.

name: Deer
description: A common herbivorous animal, a deer is typically skittish and flees from danger, but can defend itself if cornered.

name: Demilich
description: The skeletal remnant of an ancient lich, a demilich exists as a jeweled skull, its power focused on consuming souls and trapping foes.
languages: Abyssal, Common, Draconic, Dwarvish, Elvish, Giant, Gnoll, Goblin, Halfling, Infernal, Orc, Sylvan, Undercommon

name: Deva
description: A deva is a celestial agent of the gods, appearing as a beautiful humanoid with feathered wings. They serve as messengers and enforcers of divine will, embodying hope and virtue.

name: Dire Wolf
description: A dire wolf is a formidable predator, much larger and more aggressive than common wolves, often found in wildlands or accompanying larger humanoids. They hunt in packs, using their superior size and strength to take down prey.

name: Diseased Giant Rat
description: A diseased giant rat is an unnaturally large rodent, often found in sewers and dungeons, whose bite carries a vile sickness. These vermin are exceptionally aggressive, driven by hunger and a feral instinct.

name: Displacer Beast
description: A displacer beast is a predatory monstrosity that appears to be about a foot from its actual location, making it difficult to target. With two tentacles extending from its shoulders, this six-legged feline hunts relentlessly.

name: Djinni
description: A djinni is a powerful air elemental with a humanoid form, capable of incredible magic and granting wishes. They are often proud and capricious, dwelling in the Elemental Plane of Air but sometimes summoned to the Material Plane.

name: Doppleganger
description: A doppelganger is a cunning shapeshifter that can perfectly mimic the appearance of any humanoid it sees. These insidious creatures often infiltrate societies, using their disguises to sow discord or gain influence.

name: Dracolich
description: A dracolich is a powerful and malevolent undead dragon, created through dark rituals to escape death. It retains all the memories and abilities of its former draconic self, gaining potent arcane and necrotic powers.

name: Draft Horse
description: A draft horse is a large, sturdy equine bred for heavy labor and pulling carts or plows. Docile and powerful, they are common beasts of burden in civilized and rural areas.

name: Dragon Turtle
description: A dragon turtle is a colossal, primordial creature that resembles a massive dragon with a turtle's shell, inhabiting deep oceans and coastal waters. It is a powerful engine of destruction, known for its scalding steam breath and formidable bulk.

name: Dretch
description: A dretch is a low-ranking, repulsive demon from the Abyss, dim-witted but filled with malice. They serve as cannon fodder in demonic legions, often found in large, chittering groups.

name: Drider
description: A hideous hybrid of drow and giant spider, driders are created by Lolth as punishment for drow who displease her, twisting their forms into monstrous shapes. They are powerful and cunning hunters, often leading groups of spiders or other monstrous humanoids.

name: Drow
description: Drow are elves of the Underdark, descended from an ancient subrace of elves who were exiled from the surface world for following the goddess Lolth. They are cunning, cruel, and fiercely loyal to their spider queen, dominating vast subterranean territories.

name: Drow Elite Warrior
description: These seasoned drow soldiers are the backbone of drow society, well-trained and heavily armed. They serve as guardians, lieutenants, and enforcers for drow priestesses and mages, commanding lesser drow and monstrous minions.

name: Drow Mage
description: Drow mages are masters of arcane magic, weaving devastating spells in service to Lolth and their noble houses. They are feared and respected within drow society, using their intellect and magic to exert control and eliminate rivals.

name: Drow Priestess of Lolth
description: Priestesses of Lolth hold immense power and authority within drow society, serving as ruthless spiritual and temporal leaders. They channel the dark power of the Spider Queen, demanding absolute obedience and punishing those who defy her will.

name: Druid
description: A master of primal magic, a druid draws power from nature, shapeshifting into beasts, commanding the elements, and healing allies. They often act as guardians of ancient forests and sacred places, fiercely protecting the natural world.

name: Dryad
description: Dryads are fey spirits bound to a specific tree, serving as its protector and guardian of the forest around it. They are beautiful, ethereal beings who can charm humanoids and will defend their homes with their lives.

name: Duergar
description: Duergar are gray-skinned dwarves of the Underdark, descended from those enslaved by mind flayers and other horrors. They are dour, isolationist, and ruthless, often employing psionic powers and stealth in their grim subterranean cities.

name: Duodrone
description: A duodrone is a two-armed, two-legged modron, acting as a basic worker and messenger within the structured hierarchy of Mechanus. They are simple, obedient automatons, carrying out their assigned tasks with unwavering precision.

name: Dust Mephit
description: Dust mephits are petty, spiteful elementals formed from dust and air, often found in deserts, ruined tombs, or other arid, neglected places. They delight in mischief and annoyance, stirring up dust and choking their foes.

name: Eagle
description: A common bird of prey, known for its keen eyesight and majestic flight. They often hunt small animals and can be found in various wilderness environments.

name: Earth Elemental
description: A large, lumbering creature of living earth, animated by elemental magic. It crashes through obstacles and absorbs physical blows with its rocky body.

name: Efreeti
description: A powerful, tyrannical genie from the Elemental Plane of Fire, known for its fiery temper and desire for domination. They forge magnificent weapons and armor in their volcanic fortresses.

name: Elephant
description: A massive, herbivorous beast known for its incredible strength and intelligence. Elephants live in herds and are generally peaceful but become dangerous if provoked.

name: Elk
description: A large, horned deer that roams forests and plains, often in herds. Elks are typically peaceful but can charge if threatened or provoked.

name: Empyrean
description: A divine scion, child of a god, possessing immense power and beauty. Empyreans are beings of pure celestial energy, capable of inspiring awe or fear in mortals.

name: Erinyes
description: A fearsome fiend from the Hells, serving as an enforcer of infernal law and a hunter of oathbreakers. Erinyes are skilled warriors, often wielding a longsword and a longbow that drips with poison.

name: Ettercap
description: A monstrous humanoid spider-shepherd that dwells in forests and caves, tending to colonies of spiders. Ettercaps use sticky webs to ensnare their prey before injecting them with venom.

name: Ettin
description: A two-headed giant known for its brutish strength and dull intellect. Each head has its own rudimentary mind, often bickering with the other, making ettins unpredictable but dangerous foes.

name: Faerie Dragon
description: A mischievous, impish dragon capable of flight and illusion magic, found in vibrant feywild forests. They delight in pranks and often have a chaotic good alignment, but can be unpredictable.

name: Fire Elemental
description: A chaotic spirit of living flame, fire elementals burn everything in their path and reduce all to ash.

name: Fire Giant
description: Fire giants are master smiths and engineers, living in volcanic regions and building fortresses of metal and stone.

name: Fire Snake
description: These magical serpents are formed from elemental fire and smoke, often found guarding treasures or serving fire giants.

name: Flameskull
description: A preserved skull enchanted with a perpetual magical flame, a flameskull floats menacingly and can cast spells and unleash fire rays.

name: Flesh Golem
description: A grotesque monster stitched together from various corpses and animated by a powerful elemental spirit, flesh golems are incredibly strong and resistant to magic.
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

name: Flumph
description: These telepathic, jellyfish-like creatures float through the Underdark, siphoning psychic energy and emitting noxious fluids as a defense.

name: Flying snake
description: This tiny serpent has leathery wings that allow it to fly, often delivering poison to unsuspecting victims.

name: Fomorian
description: Hideously ugly and twisted giants, fomorians are cursed creatures banished to the Feywild, filled with bitterness and hatred.

name: Frog
description: A small, common amphibian, frogs pose little threat but are sometimes kept as pets or used as simple familiar forms.

name: Frost Giant
description: Barbaric, blue-skinned giants dwelling in icy wastes, frost giants raid settlements and worship the god Thrym.

name: Galeb Duhr
description: A galeb duhr is an elemental spirit inhabiting a boulder, able to animate itself and roll about. It protects its territory, usually a mountain pass or valley.

name: Gargoyle
description: A grotesque guardian crafted from stone, a gargoyle perches motionless until it spots prey or trespassers, then springs to life to attack. They often serve powerful evil masters.

name: Gas Spore
description: This floating orb resembles a beholder but is in fact a deadly fungal growth filled with poisonous gas and spores. It drifts mindlessly, exploding upon impact.
attack1_dmg: 3d6 poison (DC 10 Con save for half) + disease

name: Gelatinous Cube
description: A perfectly transparent, amoeboid monster that slowly slides through dungeon corridors, engulfing and dissolving any organic matter in its path. It leaves only inorganic objects behind.

name: Giant Ape
description: A hulking, powerful primate, the giant ape is a formidable force of nature found in jungles and remote wildlands. It can hurl huge boulders and crush foes with its massive fists.

name: Giant Badger
description: These larger-than-normal badgers are territorial and aggressive, using their sharp claws and strong jaws to defend their burrows. They are known for their fierce tenacity.

name: Giant Bat
description: Much larger than ordinary bats, giant bats haunt caves and ruins, emerging at night to hunt. They use their keen hearing and echolocation to find prey in the darkness.

name: Giant Boar
description: Known for their ferocity and tusks, giant boars are dangerous wild animals that charge intruders. They are often found in forests and plains.

name: Giant Centipede
description: These monstrous arthropods are often found in damp, dark places like dungeons or caves. Their bites deliver a debilitating poison to their unfortunate victims.

name: Giant Constrictor Snake
description: A massive serpent that hunts by ambushing prey and crushing it with its powerful coils. They are typically found in warm climates, often near water.

name: Giant Crab
description: A giant crab is a territorial hunter of shorelines and shallow waters, larger and more dangerous than its mundane kin.

name: Giant Crocodile
description: Giant crocodiles are massive, primeval predators that lurk in swamps and rivers, capable of dragging livestock or even small boats into the water.

name: Giant Eagle
description: Giant eagles are intelligent, noble creatures with vast wingspans, often serving as allies or mounts for good-aligned humanoids.

name: Giant Elk
description: Giant elks are majestic, intelligent beasts that roam forests and plains, often revered by druids and fey folk.

name: Giant Fire Beetle
description: Giant fire beetles are mundane, unintelligent insects known for the bioluminescent glands that glow even after the beetle's death.

name: Giant Frog
description: Giant frogs are carnivorous amphibians that inhabit marshes and swamps, preying on any creature small enough to swallow whole.

name: Giant Goat
description: Giant goats are stubborn, sure-footed herbivores of mountainous terrain, known for their powerful headbutts.

name: Giant Hyena
description: Giant hyenas are larger, more aggressive versions of common hyenas, hunting in packs and cackling menacingly as they chase their prey.

name: Giant Lizard
description: Giant lizards are large, cold-blooded reptiles that inhabit various environments, often used as mounts or guard animals by goblins and other humanoids.

name: Giant Octopus
description: Giant octopuses are intelligent, solitary predators of the deep sea, known for their powerful tentacles and ink spray.

name: Giant Owl
description: A large, intelligent owl, often used as a mount by fey or forest dwellers, known for its keen senses and silent flight.

name: Giant Rat
description: These monstrous rats are found in sewers, cellars, and dungeons, often in ravenous swarms and capable of spreading disease.

name: Giant Sea Horse
description: These enormous, graceful aquatic creatures are often ridden by merrow or other intelligent underwater folk, serving as mounts and beasts of burden.

name: Giant Shark
description: The undisputed apex predator of the oceans, a giant shark can swallow human-sized creatures whole and is a terror of the deep.

name: Giant Spider
description: A monstrous arachnid that spins elaborate webs to trap prey, often found in dark forests and caves, delivering a venomous bite.

name: Giant Toad
description: This oversized amphibian is a fearsome hunter, capable of swallowing creatures whole with its enormous maw and digestive acids.

name: Giant Vulture
description: A massive scavenger that soars through the sky in search of carrion, but won't hesitate to attack wounded prey with its sharp beak and talons.

name: Giant Wasp
description: These immense insects have venomous stings and aggressive territorial instincts, often found near their massive nests in forests or ruins.

name: Giant Weasel
description: Larger and more cunning than their mundane kin, giant weasels are swift hunters that stalk their prey in forests and plains.

name: Giant Wolf Spider
description: A fearsome arachnid, the giant wolf spider is a hairy predator that hunts by ambush or chase, delivering venomous bites to its prey.

name: Gibbering Mouther
description: A nauseating abomination composed of eyes and mouths, a gibbering mouther is a chaotic horror that drives those who hear its cacophony to madness.

name: Githyanki Knight
description: A formidable warrior of the githyanki, a knight is a psionic combatant dedicated to Queen Vlaakith and her war against the mind flayers.

name: Githyanki Warrior
description: A disciplined and ruthless soldier, the githyanki warrior serves its people's relentless quest for power and vengeance against the illithids.

name: Githzerai Monk
description: A practitioner of disciplined psionics and martial arts, the githzerai monk defends the monastery-cities of Limbo from intruders.

name: Githzerai Zerth
description: A master of psionic power and the martial arts, a zerth is a wise leader and potent combatant among the githzerai, shaping reality with their thoughts.

name: Gladiator
description: A highly skilled combatant, a gladiator fights for public spectacle, often armed with a shield and various melee weapons.

name: Glazbrezu
description: A powerful and cunning demon from the Abyss, a glabrezu uses its deceptive magic and immense strength to corrupt mortals and grant their wishes for its own dark amusement.

name: Gnoll
description: A savage, hyena-headed humanoid, the gnoll roams in nomadic packs, spreading chaos and destruction in the name of the demon lord Yeenoghu.

name: Gnoll Fang of Yeenoghu
description: A fanatical and favored servant of Yeenoghu, this gnoll warrior is empowered by the demon lord to inflict greater devastation and inspire its kin to further acts of brutality.

name: Gnoll Pack Lord
description: A gnoll pack lord is a larger, more powerful gnoll that leads a pack, inspiring its kin to even greater acts of savagery. It wields a massive glaive and can spur its allies to attack.

name: Goat
description: Goats are common farm animals, known for their stubbornness and ability to eat nearly anything. They are sometimes used as mounts by smaller humanoids.

name: Goblin
description: Goblins are small, green-skinned humanoids who are driven by avarice and malice, often found in tribes preying on the weak. They hate gnomes and are subservient to larger evil humanoids.

name: Goblin Boss
description: A goblin boss is a more cunning and capable goblin that leads a war band, inspiring fear and obedience among its underlings. They are often found with a retinue of standard goblins.

name: Gold Dragon Wyrmling
description: A gold dragon wyrmling is a good-natured but formidable young metallic dragon, valuing justice and honor above all else. They are known for their wisdom and fiery breath.

name: Gorgon
description: A gorgon is a monstrous bull-like creature with plates of iron instead of hide, capable of turning creatures to stone with its petrifying breath. It is a formidable beast of both nature and artifice.

name: Goristro
description: A goristro is a titanic demon, an unholy fusion of minotaur and demon, that serves as a living siege engine in the Abyss. Its sheer destructive power is matched only by its terrifying presence.

name: Gray Ooze
description: A gray ooze is a predatory, amorphous blob that patiently waits for prey in damp, dark places, dissolving organic and inorganic matter alike. Its touch can corrode metal.

name: Gray Slaad
description: A gray slaad is a horrifying frog-like humanoid from Limbo, spawned from a red or blue slaad, that possesses magical abilities and a desire to spread chaos. It can cast spells like *darkness* and *fear*.

name: Green Dragon Wyrmling
description: A green dragon wyrmling is a sinister and territorial young chromatic dragon, delighting in deceit and possessing a potent poison breath. It guards its forest lairs fiercely.

name: Green Hag
description: A green hag is a vile, amphibious creature that delights in corruption and misery, often appearing as a withered old woman or beautiful maiden to lure victims.

name: Green Slaad
description: Green slaadi are chaotic creatures of Limbo, capable of infecting humanoids with a terrible disease that transforms them into more slaadi.

name: Grell
description: A grell is a floating, tentacled brain that hunts in the dark, paralyzing its prey with venomous tendrils before consuming it.

name: Grick
description: A grick is a serpentine monstrosity with a beaked head and four tentacles, known for its ability to camouflage itself in stony environments.

name: Grick Alpha
description: A grick alpha is a larger, more powerful version of the common grick, leading smaller gricks and posing a significant threat with its strength and camouflage.

name: Griffon
description: Griffons are majestic, proud beasts with the body of a lion and the head and forelegs of a giant eagle, often nesting in high mountains.

name: Grimlock
description: Grimlocks are blind, monstrous humanoids that dwell in the Underdark, relying on their keen sense of hearing and smell to hunt.

name: Guard
description: A guard is a vigilant soldier or watchman, typically found protecting important locations, people, or goods in settlements and strongholds.

name: Guardian Naga
description: Guardian nagas are benevolent, serpentine beings who safeguard ancient sites or sacred treasures, protecting them from evil with their wisdom and potent magic.

name: Gynosphinx
description: Gynosphinxes are wise and intelligent monstrous humanoids with the body of a lion, the wings of a bird, and the head of a human woman, serving as guardians of knowledge and riddles.

name: Half-Dragon
description: A creature born of a humanoid and a dragon, combining the traits of both, often possessing draconic might and a fearsome presence.

name: Half-Ogre
description: A brutal and dim-witted brute born of an ogre and a humanoid, inheriting some strength from its ogre parent and cunning from its humanoid one.

name: Harpy
description: A monstrous humanoid with the body of a bird and a humanlike head, known for luring sailors to their doom with their captivating, magical songs.

name: Hawk
description: A keen-eyed bird of prey, known for its swift flight and sharp talons, often used by hunters or found soaring high above the land.

name: Hell Hound
description: A fiendish, canine predator wreathed in flame, known for its deadly fiery breath and relentless pursuit of prey, often serving devils.

name: Helmed Horror
description: An animated, empty suit of plate armor enchanted with spell immunity and bound to obey its creator's commands, serving as a tireless guardian.

name: Hexrou
description: A capricious fey spirit that delights in misfortune, often lurking in ancient woods to cast minor curses and sow discord among travelers.

name: Hill Giant
description: A hulking, brutish giant of immense strength but limited intellect, typically found in hills and mountains where they raid settlements for food and plunder.

name: Hippogriff
description: A magnificent beast with the head and forelegs of a giant eagle and the body and hind legs of a horse, often ridden as a mount by warriors or rangers.

name: Hobgoblin
description: Militaristic humanoids known for their disciplined armies and strategic minds, they are formidable foes in organized combat.

name: Hobgoblin Captain
description: A veteran hobgoblin warrior, skilled in command and combat, leading smaller units with disciplined tactics.

name: Hobgoblin Warlord
description: A formidable and cunning leader of hobgoblin armies, inspiring fear and discipline in their ranks.

name: Homunculus
description: A tiny, winged construct typically created by a spellcaster to serve as a loyal familiar or spy, capable of delivering minor stings.
languages: Understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

name: Hook Horror
description: A terrifying, omnivorous monstrosity dwelling in the Underdark, known for its keen hearing and deadly hooks.

name: Horned Devil
description: A fearsome fiend serving in the legions of hell, often found as commanders or tormentors, wielding a burning fork and tail.

name: Hunter Shark
description: A swift and aggressive predator of the seas, attacking with powerful bites, often hunting in shallow coastal waters.

name: Hydra
description: A reptilian monstrosity with multiple heads, each capable of attacking, and the ability to grow new heads when severed.

name: Hyena
description: A scavenging canine known for its distinctive cackle and pack hunting tactics, often found in deserts and plains.

name: Ice Devil
description: A cold and calculating fiend of the Nine Hells, serving as a master of strategy and ice-based combat in the frozen wastes of Cocytus.

name: Ice Mephit
description: An ice mephit is a small, winged elemental creature formed from the elemental chaos, often found in frigid regions and serving more powerful beings. They are mischievous and sometimes cruel, delighting in cold-related pranks.

name: Imp
description: An imp is a tiny fiend, a lesser devil that often serves warlocks or other spellcasters as a familiar or spy. They are cowardly and malicious, using their shapechanging abilities to sow discord and torment mortals.

name: Incubus
description: Incubi are fiends that prey on humanoids, seducing them in their dreams or in disguise to drain their life force or corrupt their souls. They are masters of deception and illusion, thriving on the despair and misery of their victims.

name: Intellect Devourer
description: An intellect devourer is a horrific, brain-like aberration that can devour the minds of its victims, hollowing out their skulls and taking over their bodies. They are often servants of mind flayers, using their psionic powers to scout and infiltrate.

name: Invisible Stalker
description: An invisible stalker is an elemental creature of air, summoned to perform a specific task or assassinate a target, remaining invisible until it dies. They are relentless and untraceable, relentlessly pursuing their quarry without rest or hesitation.

name: Iron Golem
description: An iron golem is a powerful, unthinking automaton, crafted from heavy iron and animated by an elemental spirit. These constructs are typically created as guardians or formidable weapons, immune to many forms of harm and tirelessly performing their assigned duties.

name: Jackal
description: Jackals are opportunistic scavengers and predators that often hunt in small packs in arid or scrubland environments. They are known for their cunning and distinct calls that echo across the night.

name: Jackalwere
description: Jackalweres are cunning humanoids with the ability to transform into a jackal or a hybrid form, preying on travelers and feigning weakness to lure in victims. They are malicious shapeshifters, often working in packs and delighting in deceit.

name: Kenku
description: Kenku are flightless bird-folk cursed with the inability to speak, instead mimicking sounds and voices they've heard to communicate. They are often driven by a desperate desire to regain their lost wings and creativity, frequently resorting to thievery and deception.

name: Killer Whale
description: Killer whales are powerful aquatic predators, intelligent and highly social, hunting in pods to take down large prey like seals and other whales. They are apex predators of the ocean, renowned for their distinctive black and white markings and formidable hunting tactics.

name: Knight
description: A master of martial combat, a knight is a professional soldier, often serving a lord or lady, dedicated to upholding a code or cause.

name: Kobold
description: Kobolds are small, reptilian humanoids known for their traps, their worship of dragons, and their cowardice when confronted directly.

name: Kraken
description: This legendary leviathan is a titanic cephalopod, a nightmare from the deepest abysses, capable of sinking entire fleets with its crushing grip and devastating lightning.

name: Kuo-toa Archpriest
description: The ultimate religious leader of a Kuo-toa community, an archpriest is a powerful cleric dedicated to the worship of its often bizarre, self-created deity.

name: Lamia
description: With the upper body of a beautiful woman and the lower body of a lioness, a lamia is a monstrous desert predator that uses its charm to lure victims to their doom.

name: Lemure
description: Lemures are the lowest form of devils, tormented and shapeless creatures of pure evil, forever trapped in a cycle of suffering within the Nine Hells.

name: Lich
description: A lich is a spellcaster who has embraced undeath to achieve immortality, gaining immense magical power at the cost of its soul.
languages: Common, Abyssal, Draconic, Dwarvish, Elvish, Infernal

name: Lion
description: A majestic and powerful predator of the plains, known for its hunting prowess and roaring territorial calls.

name: Lizard
description: A common reptile, often found in warm climates, typically harmless to humanoids unless provoked or defending its territory.

name: Lizard King/Queen
description: A formidable and intelligent leader among the lizardfolk, wielding both cunning and brutal strength to command its tribe.

name: Lizardfolk
description: Primitive, reptilian humanoids dwelling in swamps and wetlands, known for their cold pragmatism and fierce loyalty to their tribes.

name: Lizardfolk Shaman
description: A revered elder among lizardfolk, gifted with primal magic and a deep connection to the spirits of the swamp.

name: Mage
description: A versatile and skilled spellcaster, capable of wielding powerful arcane magic to defend themselves or aid their allies.

name: Magma Mephit
description: Mischievous and aggressive elementals born of earth and fire, often found near volcanoes and geysers, seeking to spread molten destruction.

name: Magmin
description: Small, malicious elemental spirits of fire and rock, they revel in chaos and burning things, found in volcanic regions.

name: Mammoth
description: Enormous, shaggy-haired pachyderms that roam cold plains, capable of trampling lesser foes with ease.

name: Manes
description: The least of the demons, manes are wretched, twisted souls of evil mortals, used as cannon fodder by greater fiends.

name: Manticore
description: A fearsome beast with the body of a lion, bat-like wings, and a human head, capable of launching deadly spikes from its tail.

name: Marid
description: Powerful and arrogant genies of the Elemental Plane of Water, marids consider themselves royalty of their domain.

name: Marilith
description: A six-armed demon of immense strength and cunning, often found leading lesser demons in battle.

name: Mastiff
description: A large, muscular dog, often trained for hunting or guarding.

name: Medusa
description: A humanoid with venomous snakes for hair, capable of turning creatures to stone with a gaze.

name: Merfolk
description: Aquatic humanoids with fish-like tails instead of legs, who dwell in oceans and large bodies of water.

name: Merrow
description: Brutal, fish-like humanoids, larger and more aggressive kin of merfolk, known for their savagery.

name: Mezzoloth
description: A mercenary yugoloth, resembling a bipedal insect, often serving as a guard or assassin.

name: Mimic
description: A predatory shapechanger that can assume the appearance of inanimate objects to ambush unsuspecting prey.

name: Mind Flayer
description: Psionic humanoids from the Underdark, notorious for consuming the brains of sentient creatures.

name: Mind Flayer Arcanist
description: A rare and powerful variant of the mind flayer, this individual combines devastating psionic abilities with arcane spellcasting.

name: Minotaur
description: A hulking beast with the head of a bull and the body of a man, known for its labyrinthine lairs and insatiable hunger for flesh.

name: Minotaur Skeleton
description: The reanimated bones of a minotaur, retaining its brutish strength and capacity for violence even in undeath.

name: Monodrone
description: A clockwork creature from Mechanus, serving as a tireless drone in the perfect order of its plane, communicating through telepathic bursts.

name: Mud Mephit
description: A cruel and cowardly elemental from the Elemental Plane of Earth or Water, formed from a mixture of mud and elemental energy.

name: Mule
description: A sturdy beast of burden, known for its stubbornness and reliability, often used for carrying heavy loads over difficult terrain.

name: Mummy
description: An undead guardian animated by ancient magic and a powerful curse, serving to protect tombs and treasures from intruders.
languages: the languages it knew in life

name: Mummy Lord
description: A powerful and ancient undead spellcaster, filled with malevolent divine power and the unwavering will to maintain its eternal dominion.
languages: the languages it knew in life

name: Myconid Adult
description: A sentient fungus creature of the Underdark, communicating telepathically and releasing spores that can heal or cause confusion.

name: Myconid Sovereign
description: The largest and most powerful of its colony, coordinating its myconid brethren through a sophisticated network of telepathic rapport spores.

name: Myconid Sprout
description: A young and relatively weak myconid, capable of some communication and the basic spore abilities of its kind.

name: Nalfeshnee
description: A hulking, pig-headed demon of the Abyss, Nalfeshnees are strategists and corruptors, often surrounded by a vile aura of despair and gluttony.

name: Needle Blight
description: A plant reanimated by evil magic, a needle blight resembles a desiccated humanoid covered in sharp, woody spines, eager to pierce any living thing.

name: Night Hag
description: These foul fiends are nightmares personified, dealing in souls and preying on the sleeping with tormenting dreams to corrupt and claim their victims.

name: Nightmare
description: A fiendish, black-coated horse with a flaming mane and hooves, a nightmare serves evil masters by traveling between planes and carrying riders through the skies.

name: Noble
description: Nobles are members of the upper class, often well-educated and accustomed to a life of privilege, though their influence and status vary greatly.

name: Nothic
description: Twisted humanoids consumed by a failed magical ritual, nothics are gaunt, one-eyed aberrations that crave arcane secrets and perceive the hidden flaws of others.

name: Nycaloth
description: Winged, six-armed masters of combat, nycaloths are powerful yugoloths that serve as mercenary commanders, excelling in aerial assaults and wielding multiple weapons.

name: Ochre Jelly
description: A sentient, amorphous blob of yellowish ooze that glides along dungeon floors, consuming organic and metallic matter alike.

name: Octopus
description: An intelligent cephalopod found in temperate waters, capable of camouflaging itself and squeezing through tight spaces.

name: Ogre
description: A brutish, dim-witted giant that delights in violence and eating humanoids, often armed with a massive club or heavy javelins.

name: Oni
description: A devious and powerful giant-kin, the oni delights in tormenting mortals and making deals that inevitably lead to suffering. They often disguise themselves to infiltrate communities and spread fear.

name: Orc
description: Orcs are green-skinned humanoids driven by a lust for battle and conquest, often found in tribal societies under the command of powerful leaders. They are known for their ferocity and hatred of other races.

name: Orc Eye of Gruumsh
description: An Orc Eye of Gruumsh is a savage shaman, touched by the might of their deity and dedicated to spreading Gruumsh's wrath. They wield divine magic to inspire their kin and crush their enemies.

name: Ork War Chief
description: An Orc War Chief is a mighty and ruthless leader, inspiring fear and devotion among their kin as they command their tribes in brutal raids and conquests. They are formidable warriors, often gifted with tactical prowess.

name: Orog
description: Orogs are larger, stronger, and more disciplined orcs, often found commanding their lesser kin or serving as elite shock troops for powerful masters. They are smarter and better equipped than common orcs.

name: Otyugh
description: Otyughs are hideous, omnivorous aberrations that lurk in refuse piles and sewers, patiently waiting for prey to fall into their muck. Despite their monstrous appearance, they possess a limited intelligence and can communicate telepathically.

name: Owl
description: Owls are nocturnal birds of prey, known for their silent flight and keen eyesight and hearing. They often serve as familiars or messengers due to their intelligence and natural stealth.

name: Owlbear
description: A monstrous hybrid of an owl and a bear, the owlbear is a ferocious and territorial creature with a legendary ferocity. It attacks with a terrifying shriek, sharp talons, and a powerful beak.

name: Panther
description: Panthers are sleek and stealthy predatory cats, known for their powerful build and graceful movements. They are cunning hunters, often stalking their prey from shadows before pouncing with deadly force.

name: Pegasus
description: A majestic and noble winged horse, pegasi are fey creatures often serving as mounts for heroes or messengers of the gods. They are symbols of purity and freedom, rarely tolerating evil.

name: Pentadrone
description: A five-sided construct from Mechanus, a pentadrone processes information and executes commands with unwavering logic, serving the greater modron collective.
attack2_dmg: 2d8+3 force, fire, cold, lightning, or poison

name: Peryton
description: A fearsome magical beast with the body of a giant eagle and the head of a stag, the peryton hunts humanoids to rip out and consume their hearts.
languages: understands Sylvan but can't speak it

name: Phase Spider
description: A monstrous spider that can shift between the Material Plane and the Ethereal Plane, ambushing its prey from unexpected directions.

name: Piercer
description: A conical stalactite-like predator that clings to cavern ceilings, dropping onto unsuspecting prey below.

name: Pirate
description: A rough-and-tumble seadog, often armed with a simple weapon and prone to brawling, seeking plunder on the high seas.

name: Pit Fiend
description: A fearsome archdevil, master of strategy and corruption, pit fiends serve as generals in the legions of the Nine Hells, eager to tempt mortals to damnation.

name: Pixie
description: Tiny, winged fey creatures of the forest, pixies delight in harmless mischief and illusions, often remaining unseen while observing the world.

name: Planetar
description: A majestic winged celestial, a planetar is a divine agent of good, sent to aid mortals and crush evil wherever it may arise, wielding a powerful greatsword.

name: Plesiosaurus
description: A large, marine reptile with a long neck and four powerful flippers, often found in ancient seas.

name: Poisonous Snake
description: A small, venomous reptile that relies on its potent bite to defend itself and hunt prey.

name: Polar Bear
description: A large, white-furred predator native to arctic regions, known for its powerful claws and bite.

name: Pony
description: A small, domesticated equine often used as a mount or beast of burden in rural areas.

name: Priest
description: A divine spellcaster dedicated to their deity, capable of healing and smiting foes with holy magic.

name: Pseudodragon
description: A tiny, diminutive cousin of true dragons, often sought as a familiar for its limited telepathy and poisonous sting.
languages: understands Draconic and Common but can't speak, telepathy 60 ft.

name: Psychic Gray Ooze
description: A rare and unsettling variant of the gray ooze, imbued with nascent psionic abilities that allow it to subtly influence minds or lash out with mental force.

name: Pteranodon
description: A large, flying reptile with a prominent crest, often found soaring over coastlines and ancient landscapes.

name: Purple Worm
description: A colossal, burrowing monstrosity that carves tunnels through the earth, devouring anything in its path with a massive maw and venomous stinger.

name: Quadrone
description: A geometric construct from Mechanus, a quadrone serves as a loyal and logical servant, performing tasks with precision and efficiency.

name: Quaggoth
description: A primal, bestial humanoid native to the Underdark, quaggoths are fierce hunters known for their savage claws and resistance to magic.

name: Quaggoth Spore Servant
description: This undead quaggoth, animated by the spores of a myconid sovereign, mindlessly serves its fungal master until its body decays.

name: Quaggoth Thonot
description: A rare, magically attuned quaggoth, a thonot wields psionic abilities and often acts as a spiritual leader or shaman among its savage kin.

name: Quasit
description: A diminutive demon and familiar, a quasit is a malicious imp capable of turning invisible and inflicting venomous stings on its foes.

name: Quipper
description: This small, ravenous fish travels in schools and can strip a creature of its flesh in minutes with its razor-sharp teeth.

name: Rakshasa
description: A fiend of incredible cunning and illusion, rakshasas are shapechangers who infiltrate humanoid society, using their charm and magic to manipulate and devour mortals.

name: Rat
description: A common, disease-carrying rodent found in settlements and wildlands alike, often encountered in swarms.

name: Raven
description: An intelligent, omnivorous bird, ravens are known for their dark plumage and mimicry, often associated with ill omens.

name: Red Dragon Wyrmling
description: A young, arrogant red dragon, this scaled terror already boasts fiery breath and an insatiable greed for treasure.

name: Red Slaad
description: A chaotic and destructive frog-like fiend from Limbo, born from a chaos phage and driven to spread more chaos.

name: Remorhaz
description: A gigantic, insect-like predator of the arctic wastes that generates intense heat within its body, capable of melting ice and searing foes.

name: Revenant
description: An undead creature fueled by vengeance, compelled to hunt down and destroy those who wronged it in life, ignoring all other distractions.
languages: the languages it knew in life

name: Rhinoceros
description: A large, herbivorous mammal with thick skin and one or two prominent horns, known for its powerful charge.

name: Riding Horse
description: A domesticated herbivore, trained for riding and carrying burdens, commonly used for travel.

name: Roc
description: A legendary, colossal bird of prey found in mountain ranges, known for snatching up horses and even elephants.

name: Rogue Modron
description: A modron that has gained individuality and free will, deviating from the strict order of Mechanus and often becoming unpredictable.

name: Roper
description: A cunning cave predator resembling a stalagmite, using sticky tendrils to ensnare and devour its prey.

name: Rug of Smothering
description: A magical animated rug that wraps around unsuspecting victims, attempting to suffocate them.

name: Rust Monster
description: An insectoid scavenger that devours ferrous metals, dissolving them into rust with its antennae.

name: Saber-toothed Tiger
description: A powerful prehistoric feline predator known for its massive canine teeth, adapted for hunting large game.

name: Sahuagin
description: Monstrous, bloodthirsty humanoids of the sea, often called 'sea devils,' known for their territorial aggression and worship of Sekolah.

name: Sahuagin Baron
description: A powerful and cruel leader among the sahuagin, often a four-armed champion wielding multiple weapons and commanding the loyalty of lesser sahuagin.

name: Sahuagin Princess
description: A rare and powerful female sahuagin, revered as a high priestess of Sekolah, capable of wielding potent magic and inspiring her followers.

name: Salamander
description: A serpentine elemental creature of the Inner Planes, with a humanoid upper body and a powerful tail, constantly wreathed in flame.

name: Satyr
description: Joyful and mischievous humanoids with the lower bodies of goats, often found in fey forests, playing pipes and reveling.

name: Scarecrow
description: A malevolent construct animated by dark magic, resembling a crudely fashioned human figure stuffed with straw, often seeking to instill fear and despair.
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

name: Scorpion
description: A venomous arachnid with pincer claws and a stinging tail, typically referring to the larger, more dangerous Giant Scorpion.

name: Scout
description: A common humanoid expert in wilderness survival, tracking, and reconnaissance, often employed as guides, hunters, or wilderness guards.

name: Sea Hag
description: Horrific and repulsive fey creatures that lurk in coastal waters, delighting in misery and transforming victims with their terrible visages.

name: Sea Horse
description: A tiny aquatic beast, often found in shallow tropical waters, known for its unique upright swimming posture.

name: Shadow
description: A predatory undead creature that drains strength from its victims, leaving behind lifeless husks. It is a portion of a living creature's darkness, given malevolent animating force.

name: Shadow Demon
description: These insubstantial fiends are fragments of the souls of evil mortals, transformed into creatures of shadow and despair. They prefer to haunt the fringes of the Material Plane, whispering dark suggestions.

name: Shambling Mound
description: A mass of rotting vegetation animated by lightning, it wanders swamps and forests, absorbing living creatures into its bulk.

name: Shield Guardian
description: An ancient, magical construct built to protect a specific individual, tirelessly guarding its charge and recovering from damage.
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

name: Shrieker
description: A type of fungus related to the violet fungus, this mindless plant emits a piercing shriek when it detects living creatures nearby, alerting others to their presence.

name: Silver Dragon Wyrmling
description: A good-aligned dragon, even in youth, a silver dragon wyrmling is curious about humanoids and often disguised when interacting with them, cherishing friendship and good deeds.

name: Slaad Tadpole
description: The repulsive, worm-like larval form of a slaad, born from a humanoid infected with slaad eggs, which rapidly grows into a red or blue slaad.

name: Smoke Mephit
description: A petty, malicious elemental spirit formed from smoke and cinders, it delights in causing mischief and suffocating its foes with its smoky breath.

name: Solar
description: A mighty angel and servant of good deities, a paragon of divine might and radiant fury against evil.

name: Spectator
description: A lesser beholderkin that guards treasures or locations, employing its four eye rays to deter intruders.

name: Spector
description: An incorporeal undead creature, the malicious spirit of a humanoid consumed by hatred and unable to rest.
languages: understands all languages it knew in life but can't speak

name: Spider
description: A large arachnid with a venomous bite, often found lurking in dark places and spinning webs to ensnare prey.

name: Spined Devil
description: A lesser devil from the Nine Hells, covered in sharp spines it can launch at foes while flying.

name: Spirit Naga
description: A powerful, intelligent serpentine monstrosity capable of wielding magic and possessing a deadly venomous bite.

name: Spore Servant
description: A humanoid reanimated by fungal spores, devoid of its former personality and compelled to serve its myconid masters.
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

name: Sprite
description: A tiny, winged fey known for its mischievous nature and ability to sense emotions, often serving as forest guardians.

name: Spy
description: A master of disguise and deception, the spy gathers information and manipulates events from the shadows.

name: Steam Mephit
description: A mischievous elemental creature born from the mixture of fire and water, often found near geysers or hot springs.

name: Stirge
description: A blood-drinking monster that resembles a small, winged insect with a needle-like proboscis, preying on creatures by draining their blood.

name: Stone Giant
description: Reclusive and artistic, these giants dwell in mountains and caverns, often admiring the beauty of stone and creating intricate carvings.

name: Stone Golem
description: A large, lumbering construct animated by elemental magic, often serving as a tireless guardian for ancient crypts, temples, or wizard's towers.
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

name: Storm Giant
description: Majestic and reclusive, storm giants are powerful elemental beings who dwell in high mountains, on cloud islands, or deep beneath the sea, possessing innate control over weather.

name: Succubus
description: A fiendish seducer, this beautiful demon can assume any humanoid form to corrupt mortals, feeding on their life essence and driving them to dark deeds.

name: Svirfneblin
description: Also known as deep gnomes, Svirfneblin are a reclusive and industrious subrace of gnomes living deep beneath the earth, known for their skill in stonecraft and stealth.

name: Swarm of Bats
description: A swirling, chittering mass of small, winged mammals that can disorient and overwhelm foes, often found in caves or ruins.

name: Swarm of Beetles
description: A creeping, buzzing mass of hard-shelled beetles that can engulf creatures, their mandibles gnawing at flesh and chitin.

name: Swarm of Centipedes
description: A writhing, venomous mass of countless multi-legged centipedes, capable of overwhelming and poisoning foes with their numerous bites.

name: Swarm of Insects
description: A churning, stinging, or biting mass of tiny crawling or flying insects, such as spiders, wasps, or centipedes, capable of overwhelming and harming larger creatures.

name: Swarm of Poisonous Snakes
description: A writhing mass of venomous snakes that strike as one, overwhelming foes with their numbers and deadly bites.

name: Swarm of Quippers
description: A churning mass of voracious, toothy fish that can strip flesh from bone in moments, drawn to blood in the water.

name: Swarm of Rats
description: A filthy, scurrying mass of rodents, capable of overwhelming a lone target with their numbers and infectious bites.

name: Swarm of Ravens
description: A shrieking, flapping cloud of black birds, circling and diving to peck and claw at any who trespass upon their territory.

name: Swarm of Spiders
description: A horrifying scuttling mass of arachnids, overwhelming foes with countless bites and envenoming them with paralytic toxins.

name: Swarm of Wasps
description: A buzzing, stinging cloud of angry insects, overwhelming their targets with countless painful stings.

name: Tarrasque
description: A gargantuan, rampaging beast of elemental destruction, one of the greatest threats to life on any world, devouring everything in its path.

name: Thri-kreen
description: Insectoid desert predators with four arms and chitinous exoskeletons, known for their telepathy, hunting prowess, and communal ways.

name: Thug
description: A common ruffian or bandit, often part of a gang, who relies on brute force and intimidation to get what they want.

name: Tiger
description: A powerful and stealthy predator of jungles and grasslands, known for its striped coat and ferocious hunting techniques.

name: Toad
description: A small, amphibious creature known for its warty skin and hopping gait, often found in damp environments.

name: Treant
description: An ancient, magical guardian of the forest, resembling an animate tree with powerful limbs and a deep sense of the woods' well-being.

name: Tribal Shaman
description: A spiritual leader who communes with nature spirits or ancestral powers, guiding their tribe and wielding primal magic.

name: Tribal Warrior
description: A fierce member of a primitive tribe, ready to defend their community and territory with simple but effective weapons.

name: Triceratops
description: A massive, three-horned herbivorous dinosaur, known for its formidable charge and thick, armored frill.

name: Tridrone
description: A loyal and efficient three-sided construct from Mechanus, serving the larger hierarchy of modrons and acting as a diligent guardian.

name: Troglodyte
description: Primitive reptilian humanoids dwelling in caves and dungeons, known for their overwhelming stench and tribal savagery.

name: Troll
description: A hideous, regenerating giant renowned for its ferocity and insatiable hunger, often found in desolate wildernesses or underground lairs.

name: Twig Blight
description: A small, ambulatory plant creature resembling a twisted shrub, animated by dark magic and serving a greater evil.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
description: The undisputed apex predator of ancient lands, a colossal carnivorous dinosaur with a thunderous roar and bone-crushing jaws.

name: Ultroloth
description: The unquestioned leaders of the yugoloth legions, ultroloths are master strategists and powerful spellcasters who command vast armies across the Lower Planes. They are aloof and calculating, treating other creatures as pawns in their endless schemes for power.

name: Umber Hulk
description: These monstrosities are subterranean terrors that tunnel through solid rock, confusing their prey with a hypnotic gaze before tearing them apart with massive claws and mandibles. They are often found in deep caves and dungeons.

name: Unicorn
description: Unicorns are majestic fey creatures that embody purity, innocence, and goodness, dwelling in sacred groves and untainted forests. They are fierce protectors of the wilderness and can heal the wounded with a touch of their horn.

name: Urd
description: Urds are winged kobolds, small draconic humanoids with bat-like wings that allow them to glide or fly short distances. They share the same cunning and trapsmithing skills as their ground-bound kin, often acting as scouts and aerial support.

name: Vampire
description: Vampires are powerful, undead creatures that survive by drinking the blood of the living, marked by their insatiable hunger and supernatural charm. They are often intelligent and manipulative, capable of turning others into their spawn or servants.
languages: Common, plus any languages it knew in life

name: Vampire Spawn
description: Vampire spawn are lesser vampires, created when a vampire drains a humanoid but allows it to live, sharing some of their master's powers but bound to their will. They are feral and desperate, lacking the autonomy of full vampires.
languages: Common, plus any languages it knew in life

name: Veteran
description: Veterans are experienced warriors, hardened by countless battles and skilled in various forms of combat, often serving as guards, mercenaries, or leaders in smaller military units. They are reliable and dangerous combatants.

name: Vine Blight
description: Vine blights are plant creatures animated by dark magic, resembling masses of thorny vines with a humanoid-like shape. They lie in wait, ensnaring and draining the life from any creature that ventures too close to their territory.

name: Violet Fungus
description: A strange, carnivorous fungus found in dark, damp environments, it appears as a cluster of purple stalks that lash out with paralyzing spores to absorb nutrients from its prey. It is usually found in caves or dungeons.

name: Vrock
description: Vrocks are grotesque, vulture-like demons, lesser tanar'ri from the Abyss known for their destructive screech, deadly spores, and insatiable hunger for destruction. They are cruel and chaotic agents of the demon lords.

name: Vulture
description: A common scavenger bird, vultures circle carrion from above, their keen eyesight spotting easy meals.

name: Warhorse
description: A powerful and well-trained horse, specifically bred and equipped for use in combat.

name: Warhorse Skeleton
description: The animated remains of a warhorse, often serving as a grim mount for necromancers and other undead.

name: Water Elemental
description: A tempestuous spirit of living water, capable of forming crushing waves and engulfing its foes.

name: Water Wierd
description: A serpentine elemental spirit, a water weird is bound to a specific body of water and is often used as a guardian.

name: Weasel
description: A small, nimble carnivorous mammal known for its stealth and sharp bite.

name: Werebear
description: A rare and often reclusive lycanthrope, a werebear is usually good-aligned and protective of nature, capable of shifting into a bear or hybrid form.

name: Wereboar
description: A hot-headed and aggressive lycanthrope, a wereboar can transform into a boar or a formidable boar-humanoid hybrid.

name: Wererat
description: A cunning and often conniving lycanthrope, a wererat can change into a rat or a human-rat hybrid, frequently found in urban criminal organizations.

name: Weretiger
description: A proud and dangerous lycanthrope, a weretiger can transform into a tiger or a swift, powerful tiger-humanoid hybrid.

name: Werewolf
description: A fearsome shapechanger cursed to transform into a ravenous wolf-human hybrid under the full moon, often preying on the innocent.

name: White Dragon Wyrmling
description: A juvenile white dragon, small but fearsome, characterized by its icy breath and predatory nature in frigid landscapes.

name: Wight
description: An undead creature animated by dark magic, consumed by envy and a lust for life, able to drain the vitality from its victims.

name: Will-o'-Wisp
description: A malevolent, phosphorescent light that preys on the dying, draining their life energy to sustain its own unnatural existence.

name: Winged Kobold
description: A kobold variant with leathery wings, allowing it to harass enemies from above with its sling or drop rocks from the sky.

name: Winter Wolf
description: A monstrous, intelligent wolf with a coat of white fur, possessing the ability to exhale a cone of deadly frost.

name: Wolf
description: A common predator of the wild, known for its keen senses, pack tactics, and ability to knock foes prone with its bite.

name: Worg
description: A vicious, intelligent wolf-like creature, often ridden by goblins or hobgoblins, known for its predatory cunning and ability to speak.

name: Wraith
description: A malevolent undead spirit, drawn from creatures that died in utter darkness or despair, capable of draining the life force from its victims.

name: Wyvern
description: A large, reptilian monster with a venomous stinger, often mistaken for a dragon, known for its territorial nature and savage attacks.

name: Xorn
description:
Earth elementals that can burrow through solid rock and have a hunger for precious metals and gems. 
Multiattack - The xorn makes three claw attacks and one bite attack
Earth Glide
Stone Camouflage
Treasure Sense

name: Yeti
description: A fearsome, ape-like beast that dwells in icy wastes, known for its chilling gaze and deadly claws.

name: Yochlol
description: A treacherous handmaiden of Lolth, this demon can assume the form of a giant spider or a cloud of noxious gas.

name: Young Black Dragon
description: A cruel and territorial acidic dragon, often found in desolate swamps and marshes, delighting in the suffering of others.

name: Young Blue Dragon
description: Vain and territorial desert predators, these dragons favor dry, hot climates and strike with devastating lightning breath.

name: Young Brass Dragon
description: Gregarious and talkative desert dwellers, these benevolent dragons are known for their scorching breath and endless conversations.

name: Young Bronze Dragon
description: Honorable and curious inhabitants of coastal regions, these dragons protect ships and battle evil, wielding a powerful lightning breath.

name: Young Copper Dragon
description: Playful and cunning dwellers of rocky hills, these trickster dragons love riddles, pranks, and a good laugh, incapacitating foes with acid.

name: Young Gold Dragon
description: Majestic and unwavering champions of justice, these dragons hide in humanoid form, fighting evil with fire and a keen intellect.

name: Young Green Dragon
description: Malicious and territorial forest dwellers, these cunning dragons use poison breath and clever tactics to dominate their woodland domains.

name: Young Red Dragon
description: A cruel and greedy predator, a young red dragon already possesses formidable power, hoarding treasure and incinerating anything that stands in its way.

name: Young Red Shadow Dragon
description: A sinister variant of the already fearsome red dragon, this creature lurks in shadows, drawing power from them to further its malevolent schemes and fiery devastation.

name: Young Remorhaz
description: A young remorhaz is a colossal, insect-like predator of icy regions, capable of generating intense heat within its body to melt snow and ice or incinerate its prey.

name: Young Silver Dragon
description: A benevolent and often gregarious creature, a young silver dragon delights in the company of humanoids, often assuming a humanoid form to interact with them and fight against evil.

name: Young White Dragon
description: The least intelligent but most savage of the chromatic dragons, a young white dragon is a frigid, predatory beast that rules over icy wastes and mercilessly hunts any trespassers.
speed: 40 ft., burrow 20 ft., fly 80 ft., swim 40 ft.

name: Yuan-ti Abomination
description: A terrifying leader among its kind, the yuan-ti abomination is a large, serpentine humanoid, fully imbued with the corrupting influence of the yuan-ti's dark gods.

name: Yuan-ti Malison
description: The most common and diverse type of yuan-ti, malisons are hybrid serpent-humanoids that possess various snake-like features and magical abilities.

name: Yuan-ti Pureblood
description: Appearing almost entirely human with only subtle serpentine features, yuan-ti purebloods are spies and infiltrators, often blending into humanoid societies.
